global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with a clear focus on the service offered by CraveLoop.
global.main_message: CraveLoop offers food delivery with a promotional sale.

elements.label: Orange background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background fills the canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'CraveLoop' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Circular icon
elements.description: A simple circular icon is centered, likely representing a product or service, with a clean design.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circle is placed slightly off-center, adding a decorative touch to the design.

elements.label: Another small circle
elements.description: Another small circle, similar to the previous one, is positioned nearby, enhancing the visual interest.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text reads 'Your cravings, delivered' in a large, bold font, conveying the main message of the ad.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A bright yellow 'SALE' badge is positioned at the top right corner, drawing attention to a special offer.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price is displayed as '€29.99' in a prominent font, indicating the cost of the service.
